emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the Hotel Westport website and wanted to share some honest observations based on a quick audit. No pitch - just a fresh pair of eyes.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 78/100
========================================

5 issues identified:

HIGH
--------------------
- 2 HTTPS mixed content
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- 12 external scripts
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- No FAQ schema
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Small font on mobile
 MEDIUM
--------------------
- Missing social meta tags


WHAT'S WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Business is established and operational
+ Has independent web presence
+ Active in local market

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.

If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios

issues.label: 2 HTTPS mixed content
issues.siteHint: This issue may affect user experience or rankings.

issues.detail: Each script tag adds a roundtrip. 12+ scripts mean 2-4 seconds extra load time.
issues.label: 12 external scripts
issues.check: Open DevTools > Network tab, filter by JS. Count how many files load.
issues.siteHint: 40% of users abandon sites that take longer than 3 seconds to load.

issues.detail: FAQ rich results in Google are a missed opportunity for visibility.
issues.label: No FAQ schema
issues.check: Search a common question about your business. Do you see expandable answers?
issues.siteHint: FAQ rich results take up 3x more space in search results.

issues.detail: Body text below 16px makes iOS zoom in, causing a poor mobile experience.
issues.label: Small font on mobile
issues.check: Open your site on a phone. Can you comfortably read the body text?
issues.siteHint: 70% of hotel bookings are researched on mobile devices.

issues.detail: Open Graph tags control how your site appears when shared on Facebook, LinkedIn, and WhatsApp.
issues.label: Missing social meta tags
issues.check: Share your URL on Facebook or LinkedIn. Does it show a proper preview image and description?
issues.siteHint: Posts with rich previews get 2x more clicks.
